option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"/Users/john_kallen/Desktop/git-clones/code-flow-analyzer":"{\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/VariablePanel.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `VariablePanel`, which provides a user interface for displaying and editing variables. Here\\u0027s a summary of the class and its functions:\\n\\n`VariablePanel`: A class that creates a panel to display and edit variables, with the ability to notify a listener when a variable\\u0027s value is changed.\\n\\n`getView()`: Returns the root node of the VariablePanel, which is a VBox.\\n\\n`setVariableChangeListener(BiConsumer\\u003cString, Object\\u003e listener)`: Sets a listener that will be notified when a variable\\u0027s value is changed.\\n\\n`updateVariables(Map\\u003cString, Object\\u003e vars)`: Updates the variables displayed in the panel and rebuilds the grid.\\n\\n`getCurrentVariables()`: Returns an unmodifiable map of the current variables and their values.\\n\\n`getVariableValue(String name)`: Returns the value of the specified variable.\\n\\n`clear()`: Clears the variables displayed in the panel.\\n\\n`rebuildGrid()`: Rebuilds the grid of variable name, value, and \\\"Apply\\\" button for each variable.\\n\\n`parseValue(String text, Object originalValue)`: Parses the input text and returns the appropriate object type based on the original value.\\n\\n`inferBestType(String value)`: Infers the best data type for the given string value.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/MainView.java\":\"This file contains the implementation of the `MainView` class, which is responsible for the main user interface of the application. It includes several other classes and functions that work together to provide the functionality of the application.\\n\\n`MainView`: The main class that manages the user interface, including the code editor, variable panel, flow chart view, and various control buttons.\\n\\n`analyzeCode()`: Analyzes the code entered in the code editor, parses it, and updates the flow chart view and variable panel accordingly.\\n\\n`step()`: Executes a single step of the code and updates the flow chart view and variable panel to reflect the current state of the execution.\\n\\n`variablePanel.setVariableChangeListener()`: Listens for changes to the variables in the variable panel and updates the execution engine accordingly.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/export/DrawIoExporter.java\":\"This file contains a single class and one function:\\n\\n`DrawIoExporter`: A class that exports a list of `FlowNode` objects to a DrawIO-compatible XML format.\\n\\n`export`: A function that takes a list of `FlowNode` objects and generates a DrawIO-compatible XML representation of the nodes.\\n\\nThe purpose of this file is to provide a way to export a list of `FlowNode` objects to a format that can be used by the DrawIO diagramming tool.\",\"/src/main/java/sample_code/LoopAndIfExample.java\":\"This file contains a single class and two functions:\\n\\n`LoopAndIfExample`: A class that demonstrates the use of loops and if-else statements in Java.\\n\\n`checkEvenOdd(int limit)`: A function that iterates through numbers from 1 to the given limit and checks if each number is even or odd, printing the result to the console.\\n\\n`main(String[] args)`: The main function that calls the `checkEvenOdd` function to demonstrate its functionality.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/FlowEdge.java\":\"This file defines a single class, `FlowEdge`, which represents an edge in a flow diagram.\\n\\n`FlowEdge`: A class that represents an edge in a flow diagram, with properties for the source node ID, the destination node ID, and a label.\\n\\n`key()`: A method that returns a unique key for the edge, formed by concatenating the source and destination node IDs with an arrow in between.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/MainApp.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for a JavaFX application called \\\"Code Flow Analyzer\\\". It contains the following:\\n\\n`MainApp`: The main class that extends the `Application` class and is responsible for launching the application.\\n\\n`start(Stage stage)`: The main entry point of the application, which creates the main view and sets up the scene and stage for the application.\\n\\n`main(String[] args)`: The main method that calls the `launch()` method to start the application.\\n\\nOverall, this file sets up the main application and launches the \\\"Code Flow Analyzer\\\" application using JavaFX.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/FlowNode.java\":\"This file defines a single class, `FlowNode`, which represents a node in a flow diagram. The class contains various properties that describe the node, such as its ID, label, type, position, and size. Additionally, it includes properties related to the execution of the node, such as variable name, expression, and condition. The file does not contain any functions, but rather serves as a data model for representing the structure and properties of a flow node.\\n\\n`FlowNode`: A class that represents a node in a flow diagram, containing properties that describe the node\\u0027s characteristics and execution-related metadata.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/engine/ExecutionEngine.java\":\"This file contains an `ExecutionEngine` class that implements a simple execution engine for a flow-based programming model. The engine can execute flow nodes, evaluate conditions, and manage the execution context.\\n\\n`ExecutionEngine`: A class that manages the execution of a flow-based program, including executing nodes, evaluating conditions, and managing the execution context.\\n\\n`step()`: Executes the next step in the flow-based program, returning a `StepEvent` that indicates whether a node or edge is being displayed.\\n`getVariables()`: Returns an unmodifiable map of the current variables in the execution context.\\n`setVariable(String name, Object value)`: Sets the value of a variable in the execution context.\\n`setVariables(Map\\u003cString, Object\\u003e updatedVariables)`: Sets multiple variables in the execution context.\\n`hasVariable(String name)`: Checks if a variable exists in the execution context.\\n`executeNode(FlowNode node)`: Executes a flow node based on its type (decision, end, or other).\\n`executeProcess(FlowNode node)`: Executes the expression associated with a flow node.\\n`evaluateExpression(String expr)`: Evaluates an expression and returns the result.\\n`evaluateCondition(String condition)`: Evaluates a condition and returns the result.\\n`toInt(Object value)`: Converts an object to an integer value.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/StepEvent.java\":\"This file defines a `StepEvent` class and its associated static methods.\\n\\n`StepEvent`: A class that represents a step event in a workflow, with three possible types: `NODE`, `EDGE`, and `COMPLETE`.\\n\\n`node(String nodeId)`: A static method that creates a `StepEvent` object with the `NODE` type and the specified `nodeId`.\\n\\n`edge(String fromId, String toId)`: A static method that creates a `StepEvent` object with the `EDGE` type and the specified `edgeFromId` and `edgeToId`.\\n\\n`complete()`: A static method that creates a `StepEvent` object with the `COMPLETE` type.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/parser/CodeParser.java\":\"This file contains a single class `CodeParser` that is responsible for parsing Java code and generating a flow diagram representation of the code.\\n\\n`CodeParser`: This class is responsible for parsing Java code, identifying different code constructs (such as variables, methods, if-else statements, etc.), and generating a flow diagram representation of the code.\\n\\n`parse(String code)`: This function takes a Java code snippet as input, parses it, and returns a `ParseResult` object containing the variables, flow nodes, and flow edges extracted from the code.\\n\\n`addIf(ParseResult result, IfStmt ifStmt, FlowNode previous, Layout layout)`: This function processes an `if-else` statement in the code, creating decision nodes and true/false branches in the flow diagram.\\n\\n`createVerticalBranch(ParseResult result, List\\u003cStatement\\u003e statements, double x, double startY, Layout layout)`: This function creates a vertical branch in the flow diagram, adding nodes for each statement in the provided list.\\n\\n`unwrapStatements(Statement stmt)`: This function unwraps a statement, handling the case where the statement is a `BlockStmt` (a block of statements).\\n\\n`createProcessNode(Statement stmt, double x, double y, double width, double height)`: This function creates a `FlowNode` object representing a statement in the code, with the appropriate node type (PROCESS or END).\\n\\n`Layout`: This is a private static class that holds layout-related information, such as the center x-coordinate, current y-coordinate, node width and height, and vertical gap between nodes.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/FlowChartView.java\":\"This file contains a single class `FlowChartView` that provides a visual representation of a flow chart. Here are the class and function summaries:\\n\\n`FlowChartView`: A class that manages the rendering and interaction of a flow chart visualization.\\n\\n`getView()`: Returns the root Pane of the flow chart view.\\n`clear()`: Clears the content of the flow chart view.\\n`drawFlow(List\\u003cFlowNode\\u003e nodes, List\\u003cFlowEdge\\u003e edges)`: Draws the flow chart based on the provided nodes and edges.\\n`clearHighlights()`: Clears any highlights on the nodes and edges of the flow chart.\\n`highlightNode(String nodeId)`: Highlights the node with the specified ID.\\n`highlightEdge(String fromId, String toId)`: Highlights the edge between the nodes with the specified IDs.\\n`resetView()`: Resets the view to the default scale and position.\\n`fitToScreen()`: Fits the flow chart to the available screen space.\\n`setupZoom()`: Sets up the zoom functionality for the flow chart view.\\n`setupPan()`: Sets up the panning functionality for the flow chart view.\\n`drawEdge(FlowNode from, FlowNode to, String label)`: Draws an edge between the specified nodes with the given label.\\n`createLine(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)`: Creates a new line with the specified coordinates.\\n`createEdgeLabel(FlowNode from, FlowNode to, String label)`: Creates a text label for the edge between the specified nodes.\\n`createShape(FlowNode node)`: Creates a shape representation of the specified node.\\n`findNodeById(List\\u003cFlowNode\\u003e nodes, String id)`: Finds a node in the list by its ID.\\n`clamp(double value, double min, double max)`: Clamps the given value between the specified minimum and maximum values.\",\"/src/main/java/sample_code/Simple.java\":\"This file does not contain any classes or functions. It appears to be a set of sample Java code snippets that demonstrate the use of conditional statements (if-else) and variable manipulation. The code snippets illustrate different scenarios where variables are initialized, compared, and updated based on the conditions. The purpose of this file is to provide simple examples of basic Java programming concepts.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/enums/NodeType.java\":\"This file defines an `enum` called `NodeType` which represents the different types of nodes that can be used in a workflow or process diagram. The `enum` has the following values:\\n\\n`NodeType`: Defines the different types of nodes that can be used in a workflow or process diagram, such as `START`, `PROCESS`, `DECISION`, `END`, and `JOIN`.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/ExecutionContext.java\":\"This file defines a single class `ExecutionContext` that represents the execution context of a code flow.\\n\\n`ExecutionContext`: A class that holds the execution context of a code flow, including variables, the current node ID, and a flag indicating whether the execution is finished.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, but rather defines the structure of the `ExecutionContext` class, which is likely used to manage the state of a code flow execution.\",\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/Pair.java\":\"This file defines a generic `Pair` class that holds two objects of different types.\\n\\n`Pair\\u003cT,U\\u003e`: A generic class that represents a pair of objects of types `T` and `U`.\\n\\n`Pair(T first, U second)`: A constructor that initializes the `first` and `second` fields of the `Pair` object.\\n\\n`getFirst()`: A method that returns the first object in the `Pair`.\\n\\n`getSecond()`: A method that returns the second object in the `Pair`.\",\"/README.md\":\"This file appears to be a README.md file for a project called \\\"Code-Flow-Analyzer\\\". It does not contain any classes or functions, but rather provides information about the project, including:\\n\\n1. A brief description of the project and its features.\\n2. Information about the technologies used to build the project.\\n3. Instructions for setting up and running the project locally.\\n4. Usage examples and a roadmap for future development.\\n5. Contribution guidelines and contact information.\\n6. Acknowledgments for resources and tools used in the project.\\n\\nThe README.md file is a common way to provide documentation for open-source projects, and it helps users understand the purpose, features, and setup of the project.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"/Users/john_kallen/Desktop/git-clones/code-flow-analyzer":"{\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/engine/ExecutionEngine.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/engine/ExecutionEngine.java\",\"file_name\":\"ExecutionEngine.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"ExecutionEngine\",\"method_parameters\":\"(List\\u003cFlowNode\\u003e nodes, Map\\u003cString, Object\\u003e initialVariables)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"nodes\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"initialVariables\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[24,4],[36,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"step\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"StepEvent\",\"scope\":[[38,4],[73,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getVariables\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[75,4],[77,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setVariable\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String name, Object value)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"name\"},{\"type\":\"Object\",\"name\":\"value\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[79,4],[89,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setVariables\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Map\\u003cString, Object\\u003e updatedVariables)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"updatedVariables\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[91,4],[99,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"hasVariable\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String name)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"name\"}],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[101,4],[103,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"executeNode\",\"method_parameters\":\"(FlowNode node)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"node\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[105,4],[126,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"executeProcess\",\"method_parameters\":\"(FlowNode node)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"node\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[128,4],[173,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"evaluateExpression\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String expr)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"expr\"}],\"return_type\":\"Object\",\"scope\":[[175,4],[213,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"evaluateCondition\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String condition)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"condition\"}],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[215,4],[258,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"toInt\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Object value)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"Object\",\"name\":\"value\"}],\"return_type\":\"int\",\"scope\":[[260,4],[271,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/enums/NodeType.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/enums/NodeType.java\",\"file_name\":\"NodeType.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/export/DrawIoExporter.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/export/DrawIoExporter.java\",\"file_name\":\"DrawIoExporter.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"export\",\"method_parameters\":\"(List\\u003cFlowNode\\u003e nodes)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"nodes\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[8,4],[25,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/ExecutionContext.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/ExecutionContext.java\",\"file_name\":\"ExecutionContext.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/FlowEdge.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/FlowEdge.java\",\"file_name\":\"FlowEdge.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"FlowEdge\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String fromId, String toId, String label)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"fromId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"toId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"label\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[7,4],[11,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"key\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[13,4],[15,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/FlowNode.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/FlowNode.java\",\"file_name\":\"FlowNode.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"FlowNode\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String id, String label, NodeType type, double x, double y, double width, double height)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"id\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"label\"},{\"type\":\"NodeType\",\"name\":\"type\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"x\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"y\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"width\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"height\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[22,4],[30,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/Pair.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/Pair.java\",\"file_name\":\"Pair.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"Pair\",\"method_parameters\":\"(T first, U second)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"T\",\"name\":\"first\"},{\"type\":\"U\",\"name\":\"second\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[6,4],[9,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getFirst\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"T\",\"scope\":[[11,4],[11,41]]},{\"method_name\":\"getSecond\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"U\",\"scope\":[[12,4],[12,43]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/StepEvent.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/model/StepEvent.java\",\"file_name\":\"StepEvent.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"node\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String nodeId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"nodeId\"}],\"return_type\":\"StepEvent\",\"scope\":[[14,4],[19,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"edge\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String fromId, String toId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"fromId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"toId\"}],\"return_type\":\"StepEvent\",\"scope\":[[21,4],[27,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"complete\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"StepEvent\",\"scope\":[[29,4],[33,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/parser/CodeParser.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/parser/CodeParser.java\",\"file_name\":\"CodeParser.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"parse\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String code)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"code\"}],\"return_type\":\"ParseResult\",\"scope\":[[35,4],[111,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"addIf\",\"method_parameters\":\"(ParseResult result, IfStmt ifStmt, FlowNode previous, Layout layout)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"ParseResult\",\"name\":\"result\"},{\"type\":\"IfStmt\",\"name\":\"ifStmt\"},{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"previous\"},{\"type\":\"Layout\",\"name\":\"layout\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[113,4],[180,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"createVerticalBranch\",\"method_parameters\":\"(ParseResult result,\\n List\\u003cStatement\\u003e statements,\\n double x,\\n double startY,\\n Layout layout)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"ParseResult\",\"name\":\"result\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"statements\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"x\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"startY\"},{\"type\":\"Layout\",\"name\":\"layout\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[182,4],[207,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"unwrapStatements\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Statement stmt)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"Statement\",\"name\":\"stmt\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[209,4],[217,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"createProcessNode\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Statement stmt,\\n double x,\\n double y,\\n double width,\\n double height)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"Statement\",\"name\":\"stmt\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"x\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"y\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"width\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"height\"}],\"return_type\":\"FlowNode\",\"scope\":[[219,4],[241,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/FlowChartView.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/FlowChartView.java\",\"file_name\":\"FlowChartView.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"FlowChartView\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[41,4],[48,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getView\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"Pane\",\"scope\":[[50,4],[52,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"clear\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[54,4],[58,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"drawFlow\",\"method_parameters\":\"(List\\u003cFlowNode\\u003e nodes, List\\u003cFlowEdge\\u003e edges)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"nodes\"},{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"edges\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[60,4],[115,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"clearHighlights\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[117,4],[130,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"highlightNode\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String nodeId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"nodeId\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[132,4],[137,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"highlightEdge\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String fromId, String toId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"fromId\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"toId\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[139,4],[147,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"resetView\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[149,4],[155,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"fitToScreen\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[157,4],[201,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setupZoom\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[203,4],[233,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setupPan\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[235,4],[259,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"drawEdge\",\"method_parameters\":\"(FlowNode from, FlowNode to, String label)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"from\"},{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"to\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"label\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[261,4],[313,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"createLine\",\"method_parameters\":\"(double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"x1\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"y1\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"x2\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"y2\"}],\"return_type\":\"Line\",\"scope\":[[315,4],[320,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"createEdgeLabel\",\"method_parameters\":\"(FlowNode from, FlowNode to, String label)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"from\"},{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"to\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"label\"}],\"return_type\":\"Text\",\"scope\":[[322,4],[347,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"createShape\",\"method_parameters\":\"(FlowNode node)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"FlowNode\",\"name\":\"node\"}],\"return_type\":\"Shape\",\"scope\":[[349,4],[360,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"findNodeById\",\"method_parameters\":\"(List\\u003cFlowNode\\u003e nodes, String id)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"nodes\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"id\"}],\"return_type\":\"FlowNode\",\"scope\":[[362,4],[367,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"clamp\",\"method_parameters\":\"(double value, double min, double max)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"value\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"min\"},{\"type\":\"double\",\"name\":\"max\"}],\"return_type\":\"double\",\"scope\":[[369,4],[371,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/MainView.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/MainView.java\",\"file_name\":\"MainView.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"MainView\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[22,4],[60,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getRoot\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"Parent\",\"scope\":[[62,4],[64,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"analyzeCode\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[66,4],[88,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"step\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[90,4],[117,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/VariablePanel.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/com/codeflow/ui/VariablePanel.java\",\"file_name\":\"VariablePanel.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"VariablePanel\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[26,4],[35,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getView\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"VBox\",\"scope\":[[37,4],[39,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setVariableChangeListener\",\"method_parameters\":\"(BiConsumer\\u003cString, Object\\u003e listener)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"listener\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[41,4],[43,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"updateVariables\",\"method_parameters\":\"(Map\\u003cString, vars)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"\",\"name\":\"vars\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[45,4],[56,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getCurrentVariables\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[58,4],[60,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getVariableValue\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String
